## Problem
What problem does this solve? What are you trying to accomplish?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work? Describe the feature from a user perspective.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches have you considered?

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, or examples of similar features elsewhere.
